NEWS
Book launch: The Activist City 8/05
Chapex Wins Mies van der Rohe Award 2026
Studio expo: Dead Poets Society 20/04
Fatimazahra Hamoutahar wins the KU Leuven prize for the best Master’s Thesis on Brussels
Interior Forum THEN 20+27/04
The Faculty of Architecture offers courses in our two campuses in Brussels and Ghent. Students can choose freely from a wide variety of design studios that are at the core of the educational program and provide an interactive and open environment that accommodates students from around the world.
The design studio landscape is formed along
Engagements
with each a specific focus:
Craftsmanship
Mediating Tactics, Urban Cultures
. The master studios and electives are related to one of these engagements.
Going Public lectures
The Going Public programme of the Faculty of Architecture of the KU Leuven is highlighting the current debates in the studios, courses and research groups. It consists of a lectures series that both brings discourse to the faculty and – vice versa – internal discussions to the world.
Read more and register
here.
